text: The rise of artificial intelligence brings many benefits, but also raises important ethical questions. One major concern is bias, as AI systems can learn and even amplify unfair patterns from the data they are trained on. This can lead to unfair treatment of certain groups. To ensure fairness, developers must carefully examine their data and models. Another key issue is privacy; AI often requires large amounts of personal information, so protecting user data is crucial. Furthermore, transparency is vital—people should understand how AI makes decisions. Ultimately, responsible AI development requires ongoing efforts to address these challenges, prioritising human well-being and ethical principles alongside technological progress.
